game_info.title: PaperConquest
game_info.concept:
Paper.io 2 is a real-time territory conquest game where players control a colored block, expanding their domain by drawing lines to enclose empty space or opponent-claimed areas. Players move their block by swiping or dragging on the screen, leaving a vulnerable trail that, if cut by an opponent or if the player runs into their own trail, results in elimination. The core objective is to claim the largest percentage of the map, strategically cutting off rivals' trails to eliminate them while defending one's own. Progression is driven by achieving higher scores and dominating individual matches, with new challenges and rivals constantly appearing to test player skill. The game features both online and offline play against other players or AI, with the ultimate win condition being to become the last player standing or to secure the most territory.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/paper-io-2/id1423046460?uo=4

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Welcome to Paper.io 2, the ultimate territory conquest game from Voodoo! Challenge your skills, expand your domain, and outsmart your rivals with smooth, intuitive controls and an exciting drawing experience.

Ready to dominate the game? In Paper.io 2, you can draw your way to victory, claiming space before your opponents take over. Seize control, think strategically, and conquer the competition!

With engaging gameplay and new challenges at every turn, you'll face obstacles and rivals that will put your skills to the test. But don't worry-your strategy and precision will help you rise to the top.

And the fun doesn't stop there! With addictive gameplay and a user-friendly design, Paper.io 2 will keep you coming back for more. Whether you're playing online or offline, you can enjoy the game anytime, anywhere-perfect for all ages.

So, what are you waiting for? Download Paper.io 2 today and start your journey to victory! Immerse yourself in a world of thrilling gameplay, and claim the crown of the ultimate champion.
game_info.description:
Welcome to PaperConquest! You are a colored square moving on a grid. Your goal is to conquer as much territory as possible by drawing loops. Leave your safe zone to draw a trail, and loop back to your territory to capture the enclosed area. 

Watch out! You are vulnerable while your trail is exposed. If an enemy touches your trail, you are eliminated. If you touch your own trail, you are eliminated. Conquer the map, eliminate enemies by cutting their trails, and become the ruler of the grid!
game_info.controls:
- Left Arrow: Rotate Left
- Right Arrow: Rotate Right
- Up Arrow: Move Forward (Standard)
- Down Arrow: Slow Down / Tight Turn
- Space: Boost (Move faster)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over)
- ESC: Pause/Resume

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and boundary survival.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will steer the player in a safe circular pattern within the center of the map to ensure the physics system works, the player moves, and doesn't crash immediately.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player survives for at least 300 frames without dying, confirming basic movement and collision checks are functional.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The test controller will move out of the starting zone, make a small U-turn, and return to the starting zone to attempt a capture.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's score (territory size) increases after the maneuver is completed, confirming the capture logic works.
